channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: RIWAMA, Obio Akpo and Port Harcourt LGA Set Guidelines for Proper Waste Disposal
item.description: The Rivers State Waste Management Agency (RIWAMA) don join hand with Obio Akpor Local Government Council and Port Harcourt City LGA to stop people from dey dump rubbish for road side. According to sta...

item.title: Tiger Brands’ Fast Transformation Under Tjaart Kruger
item.description: Tjaart Kruger anaonyesha nguvu ya haraka ndani ya Tiger Brands, kampuni kubwa zaidi ya chakula nchini South Africa. Alipokuwa kiongozi, kampuni ilikuwa imejaa matatizo na kupoteza nafasi yake sokoni. ...

item.title: US Veteran Explains Cartel Fragmentation and Risks Following Jalisco New Generation Leader’s Death
item.description: Nearly two weeks after Mexican authorities killed Ruben 'El Mencho' Oseguera Cervantes, the head of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG), experts and former military personnel emphasize that the f...

item.title: Ontario Provincial Police rescue 23 people from drifting ice sheet in Georgian Bay
item.description: On March 8, 2026, the Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) successfully rescued 23 individuals who became stranded on a piece of ice that separated from the shore in Georgian Bay, near Balmy Beach, north o...

item.title: Gor Mahia Eliminated from FKF Mozzart Cup by BB Bread in 1-0 Upset
item.description: In a stunning upset at the Nyayo National Stadium on Sunday, Kenyan football minnows BB Bread eliminated the record champions Gor Mahia from this season's FKF Mozzart Cup with a 1-0 victory. Denis Mut...

item.title: TSN Women Participate in International Women’s Day Event in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Women from Tanzania Standard Newspapers (TSN) took part in the main activities of International Women’s Week celebrations in Dar es Salaam, held at Barafu Grounds in Mburahati. The event was officiall...

item.title: UST hands NU Nazareth first defeat in UAAP girls’ basketball eliminations
item.description: The University of Santo Tomas (UST) girls’ basketball team pulled off a major win against National University (NU) Nazareth School, ending the Lady Bullpups’ hopes for an elimination round sweep in th...

item.title: PM Modi Congratulates Team India After T20 World Cup Triumph
item.description: New Delhi: Prime Minister Narendra Modi extended his warm congratulations to Team India on their remarkable triumph in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup. In a statement shared on X, he lauded the team’s exc...

item.title: Understanding Israel’s Dimona Nuclear Facility and Its Strategic Importance
item.description: The article explains the strategic significance of Israel’s Dimona nuclear site amid escalating tensions in the Middle East. The site, officially called the Shimon Peres Negev Nuclear Research Centre,...

item.title: ACT school zone speed signs shorter than standards due to safety concerns
item.description: A recent investigation has revealed why school zone speed signs in the ACT are shorter than those in other Australian jurisdictions. The signs, which are lower than the national standard of two metres...

item.title: Child Dies and Four Injured After Mortar Shell Hits North Waziristan Village
item.description: In a tragic incident on Sunday evening, a child was killed and four others sustained injuries when a mortar shell, reportedly fired from Afghanistan, landed in a residential area of Golakhel village n...

item.title: India retain T20 World Cup after dominant win over New Zealand
item.description: India made history by becoming the first team to successfully defend a men’s T20 World Cup title, thrashing New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium. This victory also marks In...

item.title: Vancouver's Lebanese diaspora expresses fear for families amid escalating Israel-Hezbollah conflict following Khamenei's killing
item.description: Residents of British Columbia with ties to Lebanon are gripped by anxiety as the Middle East conflict intensifies. Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon and Beirut's suburbs, in retaliation to Hezbol...

item.title: Why Kenya should scale up investment in women-owned businesses
item.description: This article explains how Kenya stands to gain a lot if it deliberately channels more resources, policies and support towards women entrepreneurs. It notes that women already play a big role in runnin...

item.title: Women Leading the Way in Nigeria’s Skitmaking Industry in 2026
item.description: For long time, skit-making for Naija been mostly men dem business, with big names like Broda Shaggy and Mr Macaroni dey control the space. But as e be now, women don dey change the game well well. Lad...

item.title: Proteas return home after T20 World Cup amid Middle East travel disruption
item.description: Nearly a week after their exit from the T20 World Cup, the South African Proteas are finally heading home. The team had been stranded in Kolkata due to widespread flight cancellations caused by the on...

item.title: Cornwall woman, 73, returns safely to UK after being stranded in Dubai amid Iran conflict flight disruptions
item.description: Lenise Blom, a 73-year-old woman from Truro in Cornwall, has safely returned to the United Kingdom after being stranded in Dubai for eight days due to the escalating conflict involving Iran. She had b...

item.title: Trump claims US involvement in Iran's leadership as Middle East conflict escalates
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has stated he wants the United States to have a role in determining Iran's next supreme leader following the death of Ali Khamenei. Trump dismissed Mojtaba Khamenei, t...

item.title: Aden Duale’s Security Team Involved in Kisumu-Busia Road Accident, 3 Fatalities Confirmed
item.description: On Sunday, March 8, 2026, Health Cabinet Secretary Aden Duale's security vehicle was involved in a road accident in the Otonglo area near the Molasses Plant along Kisumu-Busia Road. The team was retur...

item.title: Kehinde Adegbodu Mourns Passing of Twin Brother Taiwo
item.description: Gospel singer Kehinde Adegbodu don talk about the pain wey him dey feel after him twin brother and music partner, Taiwo Adegbodu, pass away. Kehinde share old photos of Taiwo for their Adegbodu Twins ...
